name: Test Optimizer
description: Iteratively improve test suites through autonomous score-refine loops combining coverage/mutation verifiers with LLM-judged quality criteria.
longDescription:
Combines **deterministic verifiers** (test pass rate, line/branch coverage, mutation score, execution time) with **LLM-judged criteria** (naming clarity, assertion quality, edge case coverage, test isolation, DRY-ness) in a unified scoring harness.

Auto-detects project tooling (`pytest`, `vitest`, `cargo test`, coverage tools, mutation testers) and establishes baselines. Hard constraints auto-revert any change that breaks passing tests or decreases coverage. Adding new passing tests is the primary improvement strategy — production code is never modified.

Pairs with code-optimizer: strengthen the safety net first, then improve the code. Includes live `dashboard.html`. Supports full, audit-only, focused, and re-score modes.
